NotesDatabase.name: FileFormat

NotesDatabase.name: Title

NotesDatabase.name: UnprocessedDocuments

NotesDatabase.summary: NotesView collection of views and folders.

NotesDatabase.summary: Creates a new replica on a server.

NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a saved agent by name.

NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a document by note ID.

NotesDatabase.summary: Gets document(s) by key in a view.

NotesDatabase.summary: Gets or creates a profile document.

NotesDatabase.name: GetView
NotesDatabase.summary: Gets a NotesView by name or alias.

NotesDatabase.name: GrantAccess

NotesDatabase.summary: Opens a database on a server/path.

NotesDatabase.summary: Opens if modified since a given time.

NotesDatabase.name: UpdateFTIndex
NotesDatabase.summary: Updates the full-text index.

NotesSession.summary: Common name portion of the current user.

NotesSession.name: EffectiveUserName

NotesSession.name: International

NotesDocument.summary: Hex note ID within the database.

NotesDocument.summary: UNID of parent if response hierarchy.

NotesDocument.summary: True if document has embedded objects.

NotesDocument.summary: True if document is a deletion stub.

NotesDocument.summary: True if document not yet saved.

NotesDocument.name: IsValid

NotesDocument.summary: Reads item value(s) by field name.

NotesDocument.name: ReplaceItemValue
NotesDocument.summary: Writes or replaces a field value.

NotesDocument.name: CopyToDatabase

NotesDocument.name: MakeResponse
NotesDocument.summary: Makes this document a response to another.

NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Number of documents in the collection.

NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Next document after a given document.

NotesDocumentCollection.summary: Previous document before a given document.

NotesItem.summary: Appends a value to a text list item.

NotesDXLExporter.summary: Convert embedded bitmaps to GIF on export.

NotesDXLExporter.name: LogComment
NotesDXLExporter.summary: Comment to embed in the export log.

NotesDXLExporter.summary: Skip rich-text file attachments on export.

NotesDXLExporter.summary: Skip pictures embedded in rich text on export.

NotesDXLExporter.summary: Controls how rich text is serialised in the DXL.

NotesDXLExporter.summary: Exports a NotesDocument / NotesDocumentCollection / NotesDatabase to DXL (returns string when no file/stream given).

NotesDXLExporter.summary: Sets the source object (note, collection, or database).

NotesDXLExporter.name: SetOutput

NotesDXLImporter.name: ReplicaRequiredForReplaceOrUpdate

NotesDXLImporter.name: ReplaceDbProperties
NotesDXLImporter.summary: Whether to replace database properties on import.

NotesDXLImporter.name: Import
NotesDXLImporter.summary: Imports DXL into a target NotesDatabase (input from string, file or NotesStream).

NotesDXLImporter.name: SetInput
NotesDXLImporter.summary: Sets the input source (string, file path or NotesStream).

NotesStream.name: Bytes
NotesStream.summary: Number of bytes currently in the stream.

NotesStream.name: CharSet
NotesStream.summary: Character set used for text I/O.

NotesStream.name: IsEOS
NotesStream.summary: True when the stream is at end-of-stream.

NotesStream.name: MIMECharSet
NotesStream.summary: MIME character set name for text I/O.

NotesStream.name: Position
NotesStream.summary: Current 0-based byte position in the stream.

NotesStream.name: Open
NotesStream.summary: Opens a file as a stream (binary or text).

NotesStream.name: Close
NotesStream.summary: Closes the stream and releases handles.

NotesStream.name: Read
NotesStream.summary: Reads a number of bytes from the stream.

NotesStream.name: ReadText
NotesStream.summary: Reads text from the stream up to EOL or a delimiter.

NotesStream.name: Write
NotesStream.summary: Writes binary data to the stream.

NotesStream.name: Truncate
NotesStream.summary: Truncates the stream at the current position.

NotesLog.name: ProgramName
NotesLog.summary: Name used to identify the program in log entries.

NotesLog.name: NumActions
NotesLog.summary: Number of actions logged so far.

NotesLog.name: NumErrors
NotesLog.summary: Number of errors logged so far.

NotesLog.name: OpenAgentLog
NotesLog.summary: Opens the standard agent log target.

NotesLog.name: OpenFileLog
NotesLog.summary: Opens a file as the log target.

NotesLog.name: OpenMailLog
NotesLog.summary: Opens a mail document as the log target.

NotesLog.name: OpenNotesLog
NotesLog.summary: Opens a Domino log database as the target.

NotesLog.name: LogError
NotesLog.summary: Logs an error code and description.

NotesName.name: IsHierarchical
NotesName.summary: True if the name is hierarchical.
